displayTitle: The High Republic Adventures Phase III: Dispatches from the Occlusion Zone #2
synopsis: When an important Republic droid is captured by the ruthless Nihil commander called the Warden, Crash Ongwa sends Jedi Padawan turned freedom fighter Ruu to rescue it from the Warden’s clutches. Meanwhile, teenage Nihil member Driggit Parse is tasked with hacking the droid, but she just might have her own ideas about how to use it… See how they all collide in award-winning author Alyssa Wong’s High Republic Adventures debut! • Four issue series.
title: The High Republic Adventures Phase III: Dispatches from the Occlusion Zone #2
